summary: Targeted verification of footer dark-on-dark legibility fix. Primary bug is FIXED — all footer body/list/address text now renders in cream (rgba(239,223,200,~0.75)) on armadillo bg rgb(72,63,55). CTA band, stats strip, trust bar, hero H1 and light-bg body text all pass. One residual low-contrast concern: footer column headings (TREATMENTS/COMPANY/SUPPORT/VISIT/NEWSLETTER) and 'OPEN IN MAPS →' link render at rgb(122,90,46) (#7A5A2E) — a darker gold, not the brand coronation-gold #b8894a — giving ~1.9:1 contrast on armadillo, which fails WCAG 4.5:1. Legible but muted.

ui_bugs.issue: H5 labels TREATMENTS/COMPANY/SUPPORT/VISIT/NEWSLETTER render at rgb(122,90,46) on armadillo rgb(72,63,55) — approx 1.9:1 contrast, fails WCAG 4.5:1. Expected brand coronation-gold #b8894a (rgb 184,137,74) which would give ~3.4:1 (still borderline for AA normal text, passes AA Large). Whatever CSS class/opacity is applied is darkening the gold well below spec.
Same darker-gold rgb(122,90,46) on armadillo — very muted, hard to read.

issues: Copy says 5+ / 18+ / 2,418+ but review-request spec expected 10+ / 37+ / 5,000+ — content mismatch (not a legibility issue, flagging for main agent to confirm intended values).

verification_evidence.footer_body_text: rgba(239,223,200,0.7-0.75) on rgb(72,63,55) — PASS, clearly legible (tagline paragraph, all list items in Treatments/Company/Support, address block 'Lotus Plaza … Sector 104 Noida', phone +91 98119 97993, hours 'Mon–Sat · 10:00 – 20:00', © line).
verification_evidence.cta_band: H2 'Ready for your consultation?' rgb(255,247,236) on burma-teak rgb(122,62,29) — PASS. Paragraph rgba(255,247,236,0.9) — PASS.
verification_evidence.stats_strip: Numbers rendered cream on armadillo — PASS legibility.
verification_evidence.trust_bar: 'Dermatologist-led · 10+ years · FDA-approved · 4.9 · Google reviews · 5,000+ happy clients' cream on armadillo — PASS (screenshot verified).
verification_evidence.hero_h1: 'Where Science meets Soulful Care.' color rgb(255,247,236) — PASS, no regression.
verification_evidence.light_bg_body: Homepage cream sections show body p at rgb(92,74,56) on rgb(239,223,200) — passes 4.5:1. Note: color is #5C4A38 not the #3D2F23 mentioned in review; contrast still acceptable.
verification_evidence.hydrafacial_doctor_note: Could not locate a heading starting with 'Doctor' on /services/hydrafacial-treatment — either not present or under a different label. Did NOT find dark-on-dark regression on that page in visible sections; flagging so main agent can confirm the doctor-note section exists on that route.

action_items: Fix footer column heading + 'Open in Maps' color: they render as #7A5A2E instead of intended coronation-gold #b8894a. Check that no leftover global rule (e.g., h5 color, or an opacity/tint applied via text-coronation-gold/60) is darkening them. Target ≥ 4.5:1 on armadillo — consider using arabian-white or cream #FFF7EC for column headings, keep coronation-gold only for large accents.
Confirm stats numbers content (5/18/2418 vs spec 10/37/5000).
Confirm doctor-note section presence on /services/hydrafacial-treatment (heading not found by 'Doctor' text search).
critical_code_review_comments: Fix in /app/frontend/src/index.css looks correct — removing forced color on p, h1-h5, .fine, .text-body lets Tailwind text-arabian-white/* cascade. Verified body/list text now inherits cream properly.

Column heading darkening suggests an additional rule (perhaps in a component-scoped class or opacity utility) still applies. Investigate footer h5 class list — it may be using text-coronation-gold/60 or similar which reduces to ~#7A5A2E.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (primary bug fixed; residual muted-gold heading contrast issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified the footer dark-on-dark fix. Body/list/address text is legible. Remaining low-contrast concern: footer h5 headings + 'Open in Maps' link render at rgb(122,90,46) — likely an opacity modifier on text-coronation-gold. Also verify actual stats numbers match spec and locate doctor-note section on hydrafacial page.
rca of the issue: Root fix applied by main agent was correct: global unscoped color rules on p/h1-h5/.fine were forcing #3D2F23 and overriding Tailwind text-arabian-white utilities in Footer. After removal, cream text now cascades. Residual issue on h5 headings is a separate class/opacity choice, not the same regression.
